content_body:
We had a wonderful time here in this wonderful cabin. We traveled here on a 5-6 day vacation from Grayson GA and glad we did! It was teriffic staying in this beautiful cabin with one amazing view. We could not get over the entire trip! 

Thank you very much for letting us stay in this amazing home! It was absolutly great!
The Arps
Grayson GA
title: We could not get over the entire trip!
